reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Fill up your tank, use the restrooms, eat something (the gas station has all that), and be prepared for the highway towards Santa Isabel to be in terrible condition. Be kind and help the many broken-down vehicles you'll encounter along the way.

(Original)
Abasteça bem, use os banheiros, se alimenta, pois o posto tem tudo isso, e se prepare para a rodovia sentido Santa Isabel em péssimo estado. Seja caridoso e ajuda os vários veículos que vai encontrar quebrado nesse percurso.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCaHUzcm5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Correcta opción para cargar combustible y estirar las piernas. Además de una buena full

(Translated by Google)
A good option for refueling and stretching your legs. Plus, it's a good full station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbXJULV9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena parada antes de seguir viaje. Igualmente está muy sucio todo el predio. Hay una estación de servicio cerca, que preferimos parar ahí, aunque no sea YPF, solo por la limpieza del lugar

(Translated by Google)
Good stop before continuing our journey. However, the whole area is very dirty. There's a gas station nearby, and we prefer to stop there, even though it's not YPF, just because of the cleanliness.

reviewReply.comment: Lo tendremos en cuenta Tamara gracias por su comentario

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVam9yRTdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.. es excelente cuando la gente brinda un buen servicio.. los precios son bajos gracias al beneficio de su zona..
Tengan en cuenta que no siempre se consigue el combustible que se desea.. es la puerta al desierto y eso hace que se acabe rápido.. (preveer ese detalle)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It's great when people provide good service. Prices are low thanks to its location. Keep in mind that you can't always find the fuel you want. It's the gateway to the desert, so it runs out quickly. (Plan ahead for that.)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMHZidmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lento

(Translated by Google)
Very slow
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCb3JDWUlnEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención del playero fue buena pero no tienen variedad de aceites para el motor así que no conseguí el que necesitaba, no tenían sistema para pagar con la App de YPF y obtener los descuentos pero para pagar con débito sí (cosa que me pareció raro), el café estaba hirviendo (mal hecho) y me lo dieron sin el cartón que recubre el vaso así que me quemaba todo el tiempo que lo tenía en la mano. No suelo tener malas experiencias en las YPF Full pero en ésta sí.

(Translated by Google)
The attendant was friendly, but they didn't have a wide selection of motor oils, so I couldn't find the one I needed. They didn't have a system for paying with the YPF app to get discounts, but they did accept debit cards (which I found odd). The coffee was boiling hot (poorly made), and they gave it to me without the cardboard sleeve, so it burned my hand the whole time I was holding it. I don't usually have bad experiences at YPF Full stations, but this one was a different story.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCX0t6STdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Por el cambio del turno hace 15 min que estoy esperando sin que nadie te avise nada.
Ni siquiera andan las máquinas de agua caliente para tomar mates, no te dan otra solución por ese problema.
Se nota que no quieren trabajar....

(Translated by Google)
Because of the shift change, I've been waiting for 15 minutes without anyone telling me anything. Even the hot water machines for making mate aren't working, and they don't offer any other solution for that problem. It's obvious they don't want to work...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdlBMZzlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena proveeduria, bien ubicada, algo cara. Hay que cargar acá o en la Axion antes o después el Camino del Desierto

(Translated by Google)
Good grocery store, well located, a bit pricey. You have to fill up here or at Axion before or after the Desert Road.
